title: C26-2 Trimmer Head 40027102169 Replaces for FS55 FS55R FS56 FS70 FS70R FS80 FS85 FS90 FS90R FS91 FS94 FS110 FS120 FS130 FS131 FS131R FS240 FS250 String Trimmer Replacement Parts(Pack of 1)
features: Compatible Models: FS55, FS56, FS70, FS80, FS85, FS87, FS89, FS90, FS91, FS94, FS100, FS111, FS120, FS130, FS131, FS240, FS250, FS260R, FS460R, FR130, FR131, FR410, FR460, FS-KM, FSA90, FSA130 Brushcutters & Gas Trimmer.

High Quality: Trimmer head replacements are made from hard and sturdy metal and impact-resistant plastic that promises great durability while reducing the risk of breaks or cracks. Featuring premium nylon trimmer lines for longevity and superior quality. Repair stuck trimmer head, the trimmer does not spin, or the threads strip. The material combination is optimized for a prolonged lifetime.

Easy To Install: No need to disassemble the trimmer head, easily loads by inserting line into eyelets and twisting the Knob. Realize fast and easy replacement of weed eater parts. Easily loads by inserting the line into eyelets and twisting lines are automatically fed by tapping the head on the ground while the head is in motion.

Wide Use: C26-2 Weed Eater Head Suitable for Lawn Trimming, Around Trees, Between Shrubs Along Edges, Walls and Fences. Easily Loads By Inserting Line Into Eyelets and Twisting the Knob. C26-2 Dual Line Trimmer Head for trimming and mowing, nylon line is fed automatically by tap action.
description: Fix your broken trimmer: C26-2 Dual Line Trimmer Head for trimming and mowing, nylon line is fed automatically by tap action. It will fix the most common problems of your trimmer such as stuck trimmer head, the trimmer does not spin, or the threads stripping. These are signs that your trimmer head needs changing and our product is exactly what you need. For Stihl Models:Weed eater head for brush cutters & gas trimmers FS55, FS55R, FS56, FS56RC, FS70, FS70R, FS80, FS85, FS87, FS89, FS90, FS90R, FS91, FS91R, FS94, FS94R, FS100RX, FS110, FS111, FS111R, FS111RX, FS120, FS130, FS130R, FS131, FS131R, FS240, FS250, FS260R, FS460R, FR130, FR131, FR410, FR460, FS-KM, FSA90, FSA130. Replaces Number: 4002 710 2191, 4002 710 2108 Important note: Please check your engine's model and part numbers carefully before ordering to make sure that you receive the right parts and get your engine up and running smoothly. Packing list: 1 x C26-2 Trimmer Head
